meta.title: Are You Using One Big Prompt? #shorts
meta.description:
At S4x25 Stage 2, Clint laid it out: if a vendor’s AI strategy is just one giant prompt and a prayer, it’s not production-ready.

Ask the real question—are they running multi-agent systems, or is it just a dressed-up chatbot?
